message:
fix: rewrite heartbeat timeout detection using first-unacked tracking

Replace heuristic-based heartbeat timeout detection with precise
tracking of outstanding heartbeats via VecDeque. The previous
implementation relied on last_heartbeat_sent which gets overwritten
by subsequent sends, making timeout detection unreliable when
multiple heartbeats are in flight.

Changes to StreamingSession trait:
- Add first_unacked_heartbeat_sent() method (default returns None)
- Rewrite is_heartbeat_timeout() to use seq comparison + oldest
  unacked heartbeat timestamp instead of fragile last-sent heuristics

InMemoryStreamingSession:
- Add outstanding_heartbeats: VecDeque<Instant> field
- record_heartbeat_sent() pushes to back
- record_heartbeat_ack() pops from front (FIFO ordering)

FakeStreamingSession (testkit):
- Delegate first_unacked_heartbeat_sent() to inner session

Tests: streaming_session_repeated_unacked_heartbeats_timeout_from_oldest_send,
streaming_session_ack_advances_oldest_outstanding_heartbeat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
